description: From the manufacturer Zero In Bed Bug & Dust Mite Killer Powder - 250 g– Puffer-Pack Treatment, Ready-To-Use Fast-Acting Formula. Prevents Allergies With a unique dispensary system designed to target hard-to-reach areas, Carpet Beetle & Moth Killer Powder from Zero In uses a naturally derived active ingredient to treat all carpets and household furniture for immediate protection. The ready-to-use dustable powder controls carpet beetles and moths at adult and juvenile life-stages and will not leave any unpleasant smells around your home.
